name: Pumpkin Chocolate Chip Cookies (1)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pumpkin, sugar, shortening, and egg.
2. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
3. Stir the dry ingredients into the pumpkin mixture.
4. Dissolve baking soda in milk and stir into the batter.
5. Mix well chocolate chips, chopped nuts, and vanilla.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes.
